name: Deterra Royalties Limited
analysis: DRR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.5400, stop A$4.2125, target A$5.5226 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
